headline: Paul Merson makes Chelsea vs Newcastle and Aston Villa vs Man Utd predictions
snippet: Ex-Arsenal and England winger Paul Merson (Picture: Getty)) Paul Merson has revealed his prediction for Manchester United’s clash with Aston Villa and Chelsea’s ‘must-win’ match against Newcastle Unit
full_text: Ex-Arsenal and England winger Paul Merson (Picture: Getty)) Paul Merson has revealed his prediction for Manchester United’s clash with Aston Villa and Chelsea’s ‘must-win’ match against Newcastle United. United suffered their first defeat under interim head coach Michael Carrick last time out, losing 2-1 to ten-man Newcastle after William Osula’s late winner. A lack of FA Cup or European action means it will have been 11 days since that defeat when they host Villa at Old Trafford on Sunday. Unai Emery’s side earned a hard-fought 1-0 win over Lille in the Europa League on Thursday, but one win in their last six league matches has left Villa below United and in fourth. And Merson believes that Villa’s poor league form will continue against United, who know a win would bolster their own Champions League ambitions. ‘Aston Villa got blown away by Chelsea last weekend,’ he told Sportskeeda. ‘That was a worrying result for them. Now this is a big football match coming up against Manchester Un...
